expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Let workspace admins manage members without editing the database directly.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Adding membership audit records",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want membership changes recorded so that the team has an audit trail.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Membership changes create audit log entries.",
        "Audit entries capture who changed access and what changed.",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/members/schema.ts",
        "src/workspace/audit-log.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Inviting workspace members",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so that new people can join.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can invite a member by email.",
        "Invited members are created with workspace access.",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/members/actions.ts",
        "src/workspace/members/invite-form.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Changing member roles",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to change roles between viewer, editor, and admin so that access matches responsibility.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can update a member role to viewer, editor, or admin.",
        "Role changes persist and update the member record.",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/members/actions.ts",
        "src/workspace/members/role-control.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Revoking workspace access",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to revoke access so that removed members can no longer enter the workspace.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can revoke a member\u2019s workspace access.",
        "Revoked members no longer appear as active members.",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/members/actions.ts",
        "src/workspace/members/revoke-control.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Viewing membership changes",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes in settings so that I can audit activity.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings show recent membership changes.",
        "Audit data is readable from the settings page.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/settings/membership-audit.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Let workspace admins manage members without editing the database directly.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Adding membership audit records",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want membership changes recorded so that the team has an audit trail.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Membership changes create audit log entries.",
        "Audit entries capture who changed access and what changed.",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/members/schema.ts",
        "src/workspace/audit-log.ts"

      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Inviting workspace members",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so that new people can join.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can invite a member by email.",
        "Invited members are created with workspace access.",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/members/actions.ts",
        "src/workspace/members/invite-form.tsx"
      ],

      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Changing member roles",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to change roles between viewer, editor, and admin so that access matches responsibility.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can update a member role to viewer, editor, or admin.",
        "Role changes persist and update the member record.",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/members/actions.ts",
        "src/workspace/members/role-control.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Revoking workspace access",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to revoke access so that removed members can no longer enter the workspace.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can revoke a member\u2019s workspace access.",
        "Revoked members no longer appear as active members.",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/members/actions.ts",
        "src/workspace/members/revoke-control.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Viewing membership changes",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes in settings so that I can audit activity.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings show recent membership changes.",
        "Audit data is readable from the settings page.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspace/settings/membership-audit.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: No story title is a horizontal layer split such as build backend or build frontend.
